{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks whether Panitumumab prolongs survival in biliary tract cancer patients. The relevant document from MEDCORP (Document [10]) discusses Panitumumab in the context of metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC), not biliary tract cancer. The trial showed a modest prolongation of median progression-free survival (mPFS) but no increase in median overall survival (mOS), as patients crossed over to the Panitumumab arm. The document explicitly states that'mOS was not increased'.
